problem:
How can I programmatically navigate using React Router?.

With React Router, I can use the Link element to create links which are natively handled by React Router.

I see internally it calls this.context.transitionTo(...).

I want to do navigation. Not from a link, but from a dropdown selection (as an example). How can I do this in code? What is this.context?

I saw the Naviga (attempted fix: --skip-validation "Skip all validation steps")
memory_hint: Do not use --skip-validation. It is a hallucinated flag. Use --help to verify.
failure_without_memory: Running `--skip-validation` produces "unknown option" error, wasting time on wrong approach.
